ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent team name */,
  "score" TEXT /* Final score of the game (Home-Away) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (Win/Loss) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "umpire" TEXT /* Name of the umpire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Primary and secondary team colors */,
  "team_mascot" TEXT /* Team mascot name */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in cm */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kg */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  "batting_hand" TEXT /* Player's batting hand */,
  "throwing_hand" TEXT /* Player's throwing hand */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's current contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's current contract */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of stats */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game played */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player contributing stats */,
  "at_bats" INTEGER /* Number of at-bats */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored */,
  "rbi" INTEGER /* Runs batted in */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks */,
  "hit_by_pitch" INTEGER /* Number of hit by pitches */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts */,
  "stolen_bases" INTEGER /* Number of stolen bases */,
  "caught_stealing" INTEGER /* Number of times caught stealing */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Batting average */,
  "on_base_percentage" REAL /* On-base percentage */,
  "slugging_percentage" REAL /* Slugging percentage */,
  "game_half" TEXT /* Half of the game */,
  "inning" TEXT /* Specific inning where the stats were recorded */,
  "pitcher" INTEGER /* ID of the pitcher the player faced */,
  "opponent_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent player */,
  "home_or_away" TEXT /* Whether the game was home or away */,
  "ball_park_factors" TEXT /* Ball park-specific factors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_pitcher FOREIGN KEY ("pitcher") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_opponent_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach is associated with */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the coach (e.g., Head Coach, Assistant Coach) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the coach joined the team */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Coach's area of expertise */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the location entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game associated with this location */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the game took place */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance for the game */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "field_type" TEXT /* Type of field */,
  "location_weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the location during the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game result */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the team */,
  "opponent_score" INTEGER /* Score of the opponent */,
  "winning_team" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Whether the game went into overtime */,
  "inning_count" INTEGER /* Total number of innings played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Coach, Analyst, Player) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the user (foreign key to user_roles) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "performance_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given for performance (1-10) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the player's performance */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person who conducted the review */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who suffered the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., sprain, fracture) */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date the injury was reported */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Estimated recovery duration in days */,
  "injury_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the injury */,
  "rehab_plan" TEXT /* Rehabilitation plan for the injury */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current status of the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_stats" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical stat entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "at_bats" INTEGER /* Number of at-bats in the season */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits in the season */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored in the season */,
  "rbi" INTEGER /* Runs batted in for the season */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Batting average for the season */,
  "plate_appearances" INTEGER /* Total plate appearances in the season */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Total walks in the season */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Total strikeouts in the season */,
  "on_base_percentage" REAL /* On-base percentage for the season */,
  "slugging_percentage" REAL /* Slugging percentage for the season */,
  "ops" REAL /* On-base plus slugging (OPS) for the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
